questions.question: Преимущества Flink CDC 3.x над Debezium + Kafka Connect для Postgres → lakehouse pipeline?

options.text: Flink CDC только для batch jobs

Single deployment (1 Flink job vs 4 systems: Debezium+KC+Kafka+downstream), declarative YAML (no Java code), schema evolution auto-propagation (DDL flows DB→sink, sink applies ALTER TABLE), native exactly-once к lakehouse direct (no Kafka hop), built-in AI integration (3.3+: OPENAI_EMBEDDING/CHAT в transform), lower latency, operational simplicity. Choose Debezium для Kafka-centric heterogeneous downstream

questions.explanation: Flink CDC 3.x replacement для Debezium-based lakehouse ingestion. Key advantages: (1) Single deployment vs Debezium+KafkaConnect+Kafka+downstream. (2) Declarative YAML — entire pipeline в файле, no Java code. (3) Schema evolution auto-propagation — ALTER TABLE в Postgres flows через pipeline, Paimon applies ALTER TABLE автоматически; в Debezium downstream coordinates manually. (4) Native exactly-once к lakehouse — direct, no Kafka intermediate. (5) AI integration built-in (3.3+) — OPENAI_EMBEDDING/CHAT/SENTIMENT inline. (6) Lower latency, simpler ops. Use Debezium для: Kafka-centric architectures с many heterogeneous consumers (microservices, ML, analytics).
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — секция Flink CDC vs Debezium

questions.question: Production: Flink CDC Postgres pipeline crashed и не restarted на 24 часа. Postgres disk filled — WAL не освобождается. Что причина и как fix?

options.text: Flink CDC создаёт Postgres replication slot per pipeline. Slot holds WAL retention — WAL не recycled пока slot active (independent of pipeline running). Crashed pipeline = slot persists, WAL accumulates indefinitely. Fix: (1) Restart pipeline ASAP — consumed WAL released. (2) Если pipeline navсегда disabled — manually drop slot: SELECT pg_drop_replication_slot('flink_cdc_slot'). (3) Production: monitor pg_replication_slots — alert если confirmed_flush_lsn не advancing > threshold. Иначе disk fills

questions.explanation: Critical Postgres CDC operational gotcha. Replication slots — durable state в Postgres что remembers что данный consumer должен see (last consumed LSN). WAL не recycled пока всех slots не прошли это (oldest confirmed_flush_lsn). Если pipeline crash и не restart — slot remains, WAL grows unbounded, disk fills. Real production incidents tooks down whole DBs. Mitigations: (1) Monitor pg_replication_slots view actively (Datadog/Prometheus). (2) Alert if slot active=false longer than threshold. (3) Auto-drop slots для retired pipelines. (4) Set wal_keep_size cap. Critical: на permanent pipeline removal, manually drop slot.

questions.question: Что обеспечивает schema evolution propagation в Flink CDC?

options.text: Pipeline emits SchemaChangeEvent при DDL detection в WAL → propagates через transform/route stages → sink applies к target table (Paimon ALTER TABLE etc). Supported DDL: ADD COLUMN (auto-add к sink), DROP COLUMN (configurable behaviour), RENAME COLUMN, CHANGE COLUMN TYPE (compatible widening). Configurable через schema-change.behavior: try-evolve, evolve, lenient, exception. No manual sync, no pipeline restart — automatic propagation

questions.explanation: Killer feature Flink CDC 3.x. Pipeline streams two types events: DataChangeEvent (regular INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE rows) и SchemaChangeEvent (DDL like ALTER TABLE). При DDL в Postgres WAL — Flink CDC source emits SchemaChangeEvent. Это propagates через transform stages (могут adapt — e.g., add new column к projection), routes к sink. Sink (Paimon, Iceberg, etc.) applies к target table — ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN automatically. No restart, no manual coordination. Configurable behavior (schema-change.behavior YAML option): try-evolve (apply if compatible), exception (fail на incompatible change), lenient (skip incompatible), evolve (force apply). Strict improvement over Debezium where downstream needs manual sync.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — секция Schema evolution propagation

questions.question: Flink CDC 3.3+ AI Model Integration позволяет вызывать OpenAI embedding/chat functions прямо в transform expressions без необходимости отдельного AsyncFunction или external service call.
questions.explanation: Правда. Flink CDC 3.3+ added native AI integration. Transform expressions support functions like OPENAI_EMBEDDING(text), OPENAI_CHAT(prompt, model='gpt-4'), OPENAI_SENTIMENT(text). Configured через options (api-key, model, timeout-ms). Internally handles async I/O wrapping — calls API non-blockingly. Use cases: real-time vector ingestion в vector DB (Pinecone, Milvus), automated classification (sentiment, category) при ingestion, PII detection via LLM, translation/summarization. Caveats: cost explosion (API calls per row × CDC rate × time), API rate limits, latency 100-500ms per call. Mitigations: compute on INSERT only (filter via __data_event_type__), hash-cache deterministic embeddings, use cheaper models. Это disrupts pattern external Async I/O lookup к ML service.
